canonical_definition: A real-world tourism all-in-one interactive planning dataset containing 10,182 dialogues that supports evaluation of decision-making for implicit queries, environmental awareness, plan revision, and all-in-one travel planning with rich POI details.
papers: MIRROR: Multimodal Cognitive Reframing Therapy for Rolling with Resistance
